projects.name: RealVerdict AI
projects.tagline: Deterministic legal reasoning at machine speed.
projects.description: Multi-agent orchestration system that synthesizes case law, statutory text, and precedent vectors to produce structured legal opinions. Built for high-stakes litigation support with full audit trails and human-in-the-loop verification at every inference step.

projects.name: Cronometer
projects.tagline: Precision nutrition intelligence for clinical outcomes.
projects.description: AI-powered health data platform integrating dietary logs, biomarker panels, and wearable telemetry into a unified inference engine. Powers personalized intervention recommendations with clinical-grade traceability and privacy-preserving federated learning.

projects.name: Adlumin
projects.tagline: Autonomous threat detection and incident orchestration.
projects.description: Cybersecurity operations platform combining real-time log correlation, behavioral anomaly detection, and automated playbook execution. Reduces mean-time-to-detect from hours to seconds across distributed enterprise environments.

projects.name: FAS
projects.tagline: Fault-tolerant advisory systems for financial infrastructure.
projects.description: Financial Advisory System leveraging consensus-driven multi-agent pipelines to generate market analysis, risk assessments, and regulatory compliance summaries. Designed for institutional-grade reliability with deterministic output guarantees.

projects.name: Quantum-Assisted AI Orchestration
projects.tagline: The next frontier — probabilistic reasoning at quantum scale.
projects.description: A research initiative exploring quantum annealing and variational quantum circuits as optimization layers within multi-agent AI pipelines. Target applications span legal discovery, medical differential diagnosis, and real-time crisis management — domains where classical compute reaches its ceiling.
